name: TS Website
author: yourname
description: Runs the Wruczek ts-website (TypeScript Node.js app)
startup: if [ -d .git ]; then git pull; fi; npm install --no-audit --no-fund; npm run build || true; npm start

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt update
apt install -y git

cd /mnt/server

# Clean directory (important!)
rm -rf ./* || true

# Clone repo
git clone $REPO_URL .

# Install dependencies
npm install --no-audit --no-fund

# Build (optional)
npm run build || true

# Mark installation complete
echo "Server started"
